item.title: 别再堆 GPU 了：Weka 新存储平台通过缓存 AI 模型全部预计算 Token 来减负
item.summary: GPU memory is the most expensive resource in production AI, and it's also the one running out fastest. Long context windows and multi-turn conversations force AI models to repeatedly recompute information they've already processed, consuming GPU memory and compute that could otherwise serve additional users or generate
